summary: UX/Accessibility audit: 12 checks across touch targets, font sizes, i18n, loading states, input abstraction.

findings.details: 6 occurrences of 10px text found — violates 'Pas de texte < 11px' rule

findings.check: i18n: no hardcoded French text in Collection.gd
findings.details: 9 hardcoded French strings found in Collection.gd (Collection, Gloire, Rang, Passe de Gloire, Fins & Runes, etc.)

findings.check: i18n: no hardcoded French text in HubAntre.gd
findings.details: 7 hardcoded French strings in HubAntre.gd popup dialogs (Memoires, Fermer, Vies Passees, etc.)

findings.check: InputAdapter: no direct Input. in game UI scripts
findings.details: Direct Input. usage only in debug cameras (bk_free_camera, bk_ground_camera) and test scripts — acceptable

findings.check: LLM loading states: warmup + in-game generation
findings.details: llm_warmup_overlay.gd handles initial warmup. merlin_game_controller.gd:259-264,387-406 show/hide thinking overlay during card gen

findings.check: Touch targets in main game flow (encounter_card_overlay, MenuPrincipalMerlin)
findings.details: encounter_card_overlay.gd:103 btn=48px; MenuPrincipalMerlin.gd:350 btn=56px; broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1201 btn_menu=48px — all >=44px
arbre_de_vie_ui.gd:37,50 breakpoint 560px, title font 28->22. encounter_card_overlay btn 48px unchanged
parchment_pre_run.gd:71 Color(0.75,0.60,0.25,0.8) not from MerlinVisual palette (should use PALETTE['gold'] or CRT_PALETTE['amber'])
SelectionSauvegarde.gd back_button has no custom_minimum_size — depends on theme margin_top+bottom=8+8=16px which may be <44px on mobile

findings.check: biome_radial.gd font size adequacy for touch use
findings.details: biome_radial.gd:369 font_size=11 (at exact minimum). Radial icon labels may be unreadable on mobile at small viewport. Icon area not explicitly sized.

invariants_preserved: Touch targets >=44px in main card flow (encounter_card_overlay, MenuPrincipalMerlin)
InputAdapter exists and is used for core gameplay inputs
LLM loading states shown for warmup + in-game generation
